use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING MOLYBDENUM COFACTOR DEFICIENCY TYPE A

indications.text:
NULIBRY is indicated to reduce the risk of mortality in patients with molybdenum cofactor
deficiency (MoCD) Type A.
